name: CZ75自动型 | 世仇
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. Through the years it has been etched into, drawn on, and hardened with use. From my cold, dead hands
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 这把武器历经多年，已带有腐蚀、绘制和使用的痕迹。 要死就死在我手里
